verses.1: LORD, I have called on you.
verses.2: Let my prayer be set before you like incense;
verses.3: Set a watch, LORD, before my mouth.
verses.4: Don’t incline my heart to any evil thing,
verses.5: Let the righteous strike me, it is kindness;
verses.6: Their judges are thrown down by the sides of the rock.
verses.7: “As when one plows and breaks up the earth,
verses.8: For my eyes are on you, LORD, the Lord.
verses.9: Keep me from the snare which they have laid for me,
verses.10: Let the wicked fall together into their own nets
